prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: High Resolution Structure of Monomorphic AB1-40 Fibrils. Entity description: Type IIIb beta-amyloid 40 Filament. Entry keywords: PROTEIN FIBRIL amyloid-beta, protein fibril, parallel in-register, cross-beta. Polymer composition: homomeric protein. Sequence-derived non-coordinate summary: hydrophobic_density=0.45; mean_interface=0.297037; max_segment_membrane_density=0.57568; mean_disorder=0.178745.
